assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 contains: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205' and states 'The Target Branch is TC-9005 (a feature branch). The task branch must be created from this feature branch, NOT from main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 contains: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column" --body "..."' and explicitly states 'The PR must target --base TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT --base main, because the Target Branch for this task is TC-9005.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 contains: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly distinguishes: 'TC-9005 is the feature branch (Target Branch) -- this is what we check out first / TC-9205 is the task branch -- this is the new branch we create for this task's work / These are DISTINCT identifiers; TC-9005 is the parent feature, TC-9205 is this specific task'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 ('Understand the Code') explicitly lists all three files: '1. Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs', '2. Read entity/src/advisory.rs', '3. Read migration/src/lib.rs'. This step precedes Step 6 (Files to Modify).

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 contains: "With trailer: `--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'`"

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 shows the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and description). The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 explicitly parses: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (a feature branch, NOT main)'. Step 5 reiterates: 'The Target Branch is TC-9005 (a feature branch).' The Linked Issues field also notes: 'is incorporated by TC-9005'.
